title: sword texture pack
description: This is a Sword resource pack including axe and border ores this increases the fantasy of game make swords look more fantastic
body:
This is a sword pvp texture pack + axe and border ores which enhance your minecraft playing experience you should try it atleast one time this increases sword looks and axe.

IMP
It also have border ores which highlights the ore from far which help you to get ores more easily
